title: Starbound
description: This is the #1 Starbound mod for minecraft
body:
# Welcome to the **_#1_ Starbound mod**!
this mod adds all the ores from starbound and a couple of weapons and armor for the minecraft player.
Did you know i used to be a **starbound modder**?
I made this mod a while back when i still modded starbound, now i mod minecraft using mcreator. this mod adds more ores for survival. late game ores are smelted in the blast furnace. This mod adds a different option for making tools and armor.
